creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 169000
New infrastructure

Dear mcollective-puppet-agent maintainer,

The attached shar file updates to the latest available version.  While we prefer diff to shar file for updates, I chose to use a shar file because of the refactoring of the port: upstream now provides deb / rpm packages and this new setup will allow FreeBSD to provide packages with matching names and functionalities.
